title: Take the Money and Run: 3 Stocks to Ditch Before Year-End
text: Equities markets have been through some turbulent weeks. The S&P500 and Nasdaq are only returning 10.0% and 26.8% since the start of the year.

title: Is AppLovin (APP) Stock Outpacing Its Business Services Peers This Year?
text: Here is how AppLovin (APP) and DLocal (DLO) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Unity Software's CEO Is Out, but 1 Software Peer Could Be a Better Buy
text: Unity stock has tanked in the last month after a customer-pricing debacle and now the departure of its controversial CEO. AppLovin's rally looks like the real deal as it gets its business on track.

title: Top 5 Business Services Stocks to Strengthen Your Portfolio
text: We have narrowed our search to five business services stocks with strong growth potential for the rest of 2023. These are: ADP, APP, PAYX, PLTR, CPRT.

title: 5 Large-Cap Growth Stocks to Buy for Q4 2023
text: We have narrowed our search to five growth stocks that have solid upside left for the rest of 2023. These are: AMZN, UBER, NVDA, APP, LYV.

title: AppLovin to Announce Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AppLovin Corporation, (NASDAQ: APP) (“AppLovin” or the “Company”) the leading marketing platform, today announced it will report financial results for the third quarter of 2023 on Wednesday, November 8, 2023 after the U.S. stock market closes. An accompanying webinar will take place at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET on November 8, 2023 during which management will discuss quarterly results, as well as provide commentary on business performance.
